title: Rename app to AD TRIBE and redesign opening/landing page

requirements.summary: Rename application from 'AdNet Pro' to 'AD TRIBE' across all user-facing text
acceptanceCriteria: The browser tab title reads 'AD TRIBE'
The header/navigation logo or wordmark displays 'AD TRIBE'
No visible references to 'AdNet Pro' remain in the UI

file_operations.description: Update the HTML title tag from 'AdNet Pro' to 'AD TRIBE' to change the browser tab title
Update the header navigation to display 'AD TRIBE' instead of any existing app name or logo text

requirements.summary: Redesign the landing page with AD TRIBE brand identity, hero section with bold headline and CTA, and updated feature highlights reflecting community/tribe concept
acceptanceCriteria: Landing page hero prominently displays 'AD TRIBE' as the app name
Hero section has a visually impactful background treatment (gradient, texture, or image)
A clear call-to-action button is present and functional for authentication
Feature cards/highlights are updated with copy and icons reflecting community/tribe messaging
Page is fully responsive on mobile and desktop
Color palette avoids blue and purple and feels cohesive with the brand

file_operations.description: Redesign the landing page hero section to prominently feature 'AD TRIBE' as the headline with a compelling subheadline about the platform's value for advertising professionals. Integrate the generated hero background image from frontend/public/assets/generated/ad-tribe-hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png as a full-width background treatment. Update the call-to-action button styling to be bold and energetic. Revise feature card copy and iconography to emphasize the 'tribe' community concept (e.g., 'Join the Tribe', 'Connect Your Tribe', 'Tribe Marketplace', 'Collaborate as a Tribe'). Ensure the color palette uses warm, rich tones (deep amber, charcoal, off-white, gold) and avoids blue and purple. Maintain responsive design for mobile and desktop viewports.

Update the global CSS color tokens to reflect the AD TRIBE brand palette using warm, rich tones (deep amber, charcoal, off-white, gold) while avoiding blue and purple. Adjust primary, secondary, accent, and foreground colors to create an energetic yet professional aesthetic consistent with the tribe/community brand identity. Ensure both light and dark mode variants are cohesive.

Update Tailwind configuration to include custom color utilities for the AD TRIBE brand palette (amber, charcoal, gold tones) that avoid blue and purple. Add any custom spacing, typography, or shadow utilities needed to support the new landing page design aesthetic.
